title: “That’s not the nail 😭😭😭”
prompt_text: A humorous and chaotic outdoor scene featuring two cats engaged in a construction mishap. An orange tabby cat stands upright, clumsily wielding a full-sized hammer to drive a nail into a wooden plank. A grey tabby cat sits nearby, wearing a miniature yellow plastic hard hat for protection. The setting is a rustic backyard or woodyard with a large pile of chopped firewood in the background and a blue wooden shed to the left. The ground is dirt and dry leaves, and the lighting is flat, suggestive of an overcast day.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A humorous and chaotic outdoor scene featuring two cats engaged in a construction mishap. An orange tabby cat stands upright, clumsily wielding a full-sized hammer to drive a nail into a wooden plank. A grey tabby cat sits nearby, wearing a miniature yellow plastic hard hat for protection. The setting is a rustic backyard or woodyard with a large pile of chopped firewood in the background and a blue wooden shed to the left. The ground is dirt and dry leaves, and the lighting is flat, suggestive of an overcast day.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, eye-level, following the action with slight handheld movement. The camera pans and shakes as the cats begin to fight.

actions: The orange cat repeatedly strikes the nail with a hammer while standing on its hind legs.
The grey cat watches intently, wearing a yellow hard hat.
The orange cat misses the nail, causing the hammer to bounce and hit the grey cat's head, knocking off the hard hat.
The grey cat reacts with a loud screech and immediately lunges at the orange cat.
The two cats engage in a fast-paced 'cat-fight' tumble, rolling across the dirt ground.
The camera follows the rolling cats as they move away from the initial construction spot.
The cats eventually separate, with the orange cat looking dazed while the grey cat continues to hiss.
dialogue: [Sound of hammer striking metal and wood]
[Sound of rapid scuffling and rustling leaves]
